html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
Halloween Candies are Hallowed Nights exclusive Food items. 5 candies are dropped by Pig King after any valid trade during that time. The Pig King will give out more candy per trade if the player is wearing a costume skin during the event. They restore 0 to 2 , 0 to 2 and 0 to 2 when eaten. Candies stack up to 40 items and do not spoil over time. The following Candies are available, and their spawn codes are "halloweencandy_1...14".

Name Food type
Candy Apple 1 1 1 Goodies
Candy Corn 0 2 1 Goodies
Catcoon Candy 0 2 1 Goodies
Ghost Pop 0 2 1 Goodies
Gummy Spider 0 1 2 Goodies
Jelly Worm 2 0 1 Goodies
Not-So-Candy Corn 2 0 1 Veggie
Raisins 0 1 2 Veggie
"Raisins" 1 0 2 Veggie
Tentacle Lolli 0 1 2 Goodies
Choco Pigs 1 1 1 Goodies
Candy Lice 2 0 1 Goodies
Otherworldly Jawbreaker 0 2 1 Goodies
Lava Pepper 1 2 0 Veggie

Contents

  • 1 Candy Apple
  • 2 Candy Corn
  • 3 Not-So-Candy Corn
  • 4 Gummy Spider
  • 5 Catcoon Candy
  • 6 "Raisins"
  • 7 Raisins
  • 8 Ghost Pop
  • 9 Jelly Worm
  • 10 Tentacle Lolli
  • 11 Choco Pigs
  • 12 Candy Lice
  • 13 Otherworldly Jawbreaker
  • 14 Lava Pepper
  • 15 Trivia
  • 16 Gallery

Trivia

  • The Candy Lice bears a resemblance to the Meal Lice plant from Oxygen Not Included, another game developed by Klei.
  • Woodie's quote for Choco Pigs is a reference to the "melts in your mouth, not your hand" slogan, used for both M&Ms and Minstrels chocolates.
  • "Raisins" are likely to be a reference to the practical joke of disguising animal droppings as something edible, like raisins, and convincing unsuspecting people to eat them.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord

Candy Apple[edit | edit source]
Candy Apple
Food Info
1
1
1
Goodies
Miscellaneous
"halloweencandy_1"
“The cavities are probably worth it, right?”
–Wilson
“That's wayyyy better than a regular apple!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang eat many bushels!”
–Wolfgang
“Oh... it's... g-good.”
–Wendy
“WHAT IS THE PURPOSE OF SHAPING FOODS LIKE OTHER FOODS”
–WX-78
“Remember to eat in moderation, children.”
–Wickerbottom
“Even the stick is delicious.”
–Woodie
“Oh good, it's solid candy. I feared something healthy had snuck in.”
–Maxwell
“Höw sinister! I nearly mistöök it för a true apple!”
–Wigfrid
“Oh, Wendy! We'll trade you for your choco pigs!”
–Webber
“These can be enjoyable, now and then.”
–Warly
“Careful! Don't eat stick”
–Wormwood
“A nice change from baked apples.”
–Winona
“Something to sink my fangs into!”
–Wortox
“These even better than regular apple, flort!”
–Wurt
“Even candy's better when it's on a stick.”
–Walter
“An apple improved by a delicious candy coating.”
–Wanda
Candy Corn[edit | edit source]
Candy Corn
Food Info
0
1
2
Goodies
Miscellaneous
"halloweencandy_2"
“What corruption of science grew these?”
–Wilson
“Do people actually eat these or are they just a bad joke?”
–Willow
“Little corns get stuck in Wolfgang's mighty moustache!”
–Wolfgang
“The most delicious lie.”
–Wendy
“HORRIBLE TEXTURE, LOOKS NOTHING LIKE CORN. I LOVE IT”
–WX-78
“Delightfully colored kernels of high fructose corn syrup.”
–Wickerbottom
“Don't worry, I'll eat enough for the both of us, Lucy.”
–Woodie
“Waxy, just like me.”
–Maxwell
“A clever ruse. It is nöt cörn at all.”
–Wigfrid
“Haha ew! It's weird!”
–Webber
“There are better confections available, in my professional opinion.”
–Warly
“Not for dirt”
–Wormwood
“Is this even food?”
–Winona
“I suppose I could eat a delightful treat.”
–Wortox
“Made corn even better?!”
–Wurt
“A handful of candy kernels.”
–Walter
“Delicious candied corn to munch on.”
–Wanda
Not-So-Candy Corn[edit | edit source]
Not-So-Candy Corn
Food Info
2
1
0
Veggie
Miscellaneous
"halloweencandy_3"
“It's... corn.”
–Wilson
“Ewwww it's corn flavored!”
–Willow
“Very bland. Reminds Wolfgang of back home candy!”
–Wolfgang
“Sigh. At least it's honest.”
–Wendy
“INFERIOR CORN OF CANDY”
–WX-78
“Hmm, well, at least there's a healthy option on the table.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just a regular ol' cob of corn.”
–Woodie
“Who is making all this candy, exactly?”
–Maxwell
“A cönfectiön tö strike terrör intö any warriör's heart!”
–Wigfrid
“Haha, that's not candy!”
–Webber
“It could use some butter and salt.”
–Warly
“Yum!”
–Wormwood
“That's no treat.”
–Winona
“It's just human corn.”
–Wortox
“Corn!!”
–Wurt
“Not very spooky, but it is tasty.”
–Walter
“Who is trying to pass this ordinary corn cob off as candy?”
–Wanda

Gummy Spider
Food Info
0
2
1
Goodies
Miscellaneous
"halloweencandy_4"
“They wriggle on the way down.”
–Wilson
“Eww! I hate black licorice!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang feel strong when mashing tiny spiders between teeth!”
–Wolfgang
“Don't worry, Webber, it's just candy.”
–Wendy
“SPIDER CHILD. WATCH ME CONSUME YOUR TINY BRETHREN”
–WX-78
“I was always a fan of black licorice, myself.”
–Wickerbottom
“Yeesh. That's a lot of candy legs.”
–Woodie
“Black licorice, my favorite.”
–Maxwell
“Mönsters, prepare tö dö battle with a Viking's teeth!”
–Wigfrid
“We aren't totally comfortable with this.”
–Webber
“Licorice is only for the most refined palates.”
–Warly
“Squishy”
–Wormwood
“That gummy has too many legs for my taste.”
–Winona
“I could be persuaded to try a taste.”
–Wortox
“Didn't know Spiderfolk could be tasty!”
–Wurt
“Maybe that spider kid would like this. Or maybe not...”
–Walter
“That'll be something to chew on for a while.”
–Wanda

Catcoon Candy
Food Info
0
1

Goodies
Miscellaneous
"halloweencandy_5"
“My teeth are going to have something to say about this tomorrow.”
–Wilson
“These are a meow-uthful.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang not sure he has heart to eat.”
–Wolfgang
“Nine lives are not enough to save you from my hungry maw...”
–Wendy
“TINY HAIRY ORGANICS ENTOMBED IN FRUCTOSE”
–WX-78
“It almost seems a shame to eat them.”
–Wickerbottom
“These ones don't puke. I like 'em.”
–Woodie
“Almost endearing. Almost.”
–Maxwell
“The perfect treat!”
–Wigfrid
“We forgot what good things tasted like!”
–Webber
“The closest thing I've found to an after dinner mint.”
–Warly
“Hehe!”
–Wormwood
“Looks a bit flighty. Ha!”
–Winona
“Fweehee! Little kitties!”
–Wortox
“Will eat you in one bite, florp”
–Wurt
“It's wearing a little mask!”
–Walter
“I'll stash some extras in my pocket, I'm sure the children would love some hard candy.”
–Wanda

1

"halloweencandy_6"
“I... don't think I'll be eating those.”
–Wilson
“Hey Wolfgang, eat one and tell us what it is!”
–Willow
“Maybe is chocolate?”

“Lumps of bitter sorrow.”
–Wendy
“EAT THEM, HUMANS”
–WX-78
“I'd prefer none of you eat these at all.”
–Wickerbottom
“Not sure that's food, eh?”
–Woodie
“A mystery I'm not keen on solving.”
–Maxwell
“What have I döne tö anger the göds sö?”
–Wigfrid
“No worse than the other stuff we've eaten out here!”
–Webber
“I don't think those are fit to eat.”
–Warly
“Sweet stuff for belly”
–Wormwood
“Not sure anyone would eat those.”
–Winona
“This prank is ingenious!”
–Wortox
“Taste good to me, florp.”
–Wurt
“Those look suspicious.”
–Walter
“Do you think I was born yesterday?”
–Wanda

"halloweencandy_7"
“Everyone'll be raisin' a fuss over these.”
–Wilson
“Burn them!!!”
–Willow
“Little shrivelly sadlumps.”
–Wolfgang
“Life is a swirling abyss of suffering and disappointment.”
–Wendy
“THE KING OF PIGS WILL BE THE FIRST IMPRISONED WHEN I AM OVERLORD”
–WX-78
“I'll take the ones you don't want, dears.”
–Wickerbottom
“Eh. I don't mind 'em.”
–Woodie
“I am much more disappointed than I thought I'd be.”
–Maxwell
“That mönarch swine insults me.”
–Wigfrid
“Oh, Ms. Wicker! We saved these for you!”
–Webber
“Real raisins! Think of the culinary potential.”
–Warly
“Belly stuff”
–Wormwood
“That's just regular food.”
–Winona
“Hm... I don't think I'll like that.”
–Wortox
“Can eat yours if you don't want them, florp.”
–Wurt
“I don't know what some people's problem is, raisins are good!”
–Walter
“A little extra fiber never hurt anyone.”
–Wanda

“I'll tell you what it tastes like, Lucy.”

–Webber
“I don't need the whole thing, just a couple licks.”
–Warly
“Sad?”
–Wormwood
“How spooky.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu, a candied soul!”
–Wortox
“Yummy yum!”
–Wurt
“Maybe I'll give it to the twins.”
–Walter
“This little ghost I like.”
–Wanda

“Not too bad, eh?”

“I wouldn't want to ruin my dinner.”

“Wiggly!”

“Real gelatinous.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu, it slithers all the way down!”
–Wortox
“Even better than normal worm!”
–Wurt
“Gummy.”
–Walter
“Chewy, and only a little wormy.”
–Wanda

“Eating them makes me feel powerful.”

“Tis nöt meat, but tis clöse enöugh!”

“There are few things I love more than milk chocolate.”

“Best eaten by the handful.”

“Harumpf, it melts all over my claws.”

“Grrr, will eat you all up!!”
–Wurt
“I'm far too mature for trick or treating.”

“Oh alright, I'll take a nibble.”
–Wanda

“I don't do well with spice.”

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Candy Lice bears a resemblance to the Meal Lice plant from Oxygen Not Included, another game developed by Klei.
Woodie's quote for Choco Pigs is a reference to the "melts in your mouth, not your hand" slogan, used for both M&Ms and Minstrels chocolates.
"Raisins" are likely to be a reference to the practical joke of disguising animal droppings as something edible, like raisins, and convincing unsuspecting people to eat them.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Kẹo Halloween là món ăn độc quyền của Đêm Thánh. 5 viên kẹo sẽ được Vua Lợn đánh rơi sau bất kỳ giao dịch hợp lệ nào trong thời gian đó. Vua Lợn sẽ tặng nhiều kẹo hơn cho mỗi giao dịch nếu người chơi mặc trang phục hóa trang trong sự kiện. Chúng phục hồi 0 đến 2, 0 đến 2 và 0 đến 2 khi ăn. Kẹo có thể xếp tối đa 40 món và không bị hỏng theo thời gian. Các loại Kẹo sau đây có sẵn và mã xuất hiện của chúng là "halloweencandy_1...14" .
title: Halloween Candies
wikitext: {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{Event|Hallowed Nights}} '''Halloween Candies''' are Hallowed Nights exclusive [[Food]] items. 5 candies are dropped by [[Pig King]] after any valid trade during that time. The Pig King will give out more candy per trade if the player is wearing a costume skin during the event. They restore 0 to 2 {{Hp}}, 0 to 2 {{Hunger}} and 0 to 2 {{Sanity}} when eaten. Candies stack up to 40 items and do not spoil over time. I LOVE IT |wickerbottom = Delightfully colored kernels of high fructose corn syrup. |woodie = Don't worry, I'll eat enough for the both of us, Lucy. |maxwell = Waxy, just like me. |wigfrid = A clever ruse. It is nöt cörn at all. |webber = Haha ew! It's weird! |warly = There are better confections available, in my professional opinion. |wormwood = Not for dirt |winona = Is this even food? |wortox = I suppose I could eat a delightful treat. |wurt = Made corn even better?! |walter = A handful of candy kernels. |wanda = Delicious candied corn to munch on. |choose = maxwell }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Not-So-Candy Corn}} Not-So-Candy Corn == {{Object Infobox |image = Not-So-Candy Corn Dropped.png |icon = Not-So-Candy Corn.png |name = Not-So-Candy Corn |hpRestored = 1 |hungerRestored = 2 |sanityRestored = 0 |foodType =[[Veggie]] [[File:Veggie.png|32px|link=Veggie]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_3"}} {{Quotes |wilson = It's... corn. |willow = Ewwww it's corn flavored! |wolfgang = Very bland. Reminds Wolfgang of back home candy! |wendy = Sigh. At least it's honest. |wx78 = INFERIOR CORN OF CANDY |wickerbottom = Hmm, well, at least there's a healthy option on the table. |woodie = Just a regular ol' cob of corn. |maxwell = Who is making all this candy, exactly? |wigfrid = A cönfectiön tö strike terrör intö any warriör's heart! |webber = Haha, that's not candy! |warly = It could use some butter and salt. |wormwood = Yum! |winona = That's no treat. |wortox = It's just human corn. |wurt = Corn!! |walter = Not very spooky, but it is tasty. |wanda = Who is trying to pass this ordinary corn cob off as candy? |choose = wendy }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Gummy Spider}} Gummy Spider == {{Object Infobox |image = Gummy Spider Dropped.png |icon = Gummy Spider.png |name = Gummy Spider |hpRestored = 2 |hungerRestored = 0 |sanityRestored = 1 |foodType =[[Goodies]] [[File:Goodies.png|32px|link=Goodies]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_4"}} {{Quotes |wilson = They wriggle on the way down. |willow = Eww! WATCH ME CONSUME YOUR TINY BRETHREN |wickerbottom = I was always a fan of black licorice, myself. |woodie = Yeesh. That's a lot of candy legs. |maxwell = Black licorice, my favorite. |wigfrid = Mönsters, prepare tö dö battle with a Viking's teeth! |webber = We aren't totally comfortable with this. |warly = Licorice is only for the most refined palates. |wormwood = Squishy |winona = That gummy has too many legs for my taste. |wortox = I could be persuaded to try a taste. |wurt = Didn't know Spiderfolk could be tasty! |walter = Maybe that spider kid would like this. Or maybe not... |wanda = That'll be something to chew on for a while. |choose = wickerbottom }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Catcoon Candy}} Catcoon Candy == {{Object Infobox |image = Catcoon Candy Dropped.png |icon = Catcoon Candy.png |name = Catcoon Candy |hpRestored = 1 |hungerRestored = 0 |sanityRestored = 2 |foodType =[[Goodies]] [[File:Goodies.png|32px|link=Goodies]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_5"}} {{Quotes |wilson = My teeth are going to have something to say about this tomorrow. |willow = These are a meow-uthful. |wolfgang = Wolfgang not sure he has heart to eat. |wendy = Nine lives are not enough to save you from my hungry maw... |wx78 = TINY HAIRY ORGANICS ENTOMBED IN FRUCTOSE |wickerbottom = It almost seems a shame to eat them. |woodie = These ones don't puke. I like 'em. |maxwell = Almost endearing. Almost. |wigfrid = The perfect treat! |webber = We forgot what good things tasted like! |warly = The closest thing I've found to an after dinner mint. |wormwood = Hehe! |winona = Looks a bit flighty. Ha! |wortox = Fweehee! Little kitties! |wurt = Will eat you in one bite, florp |walter = It's wearing a little mask! |wanda = I'll stash some extras in my pocket, I'm sure the children would love some hard candy. |choose = willow }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|"Raisins"}} "Raisins" == {{Object Infobox |image = "Raisins" Dropped.png |icon = "Raisins".png |name = "Raisins" |hpRestored = 2 |hungerRestored = 1 |sanityRestored = 0 |foodType =[[Veggie]] [[File:Veggie.png|32px|link=Veggie]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_6"}} {{Quotes |wilson = I... don't think I'll be eating those. |willow = Hey Wolfgang, eat one and tell us what it is! |wolfgang = Maybe is chocolate? |wendy = Lumps of bitter sorrow. |wx78 = EAT THEM, HUMANS |wickerbottom = I'd prefer none of you eat these at all. |woodie = Not sure that's food, eh? |maxwell = A mystery I'm not keen on solving. |wigfrid = What have I döne tö anger the göds sö? |webber = No worse than the other stuff we've eaten out here! |warly = I don't think those are fit to eat. |wormwood = Sweet stuff for belly |winona = Not sure anyone would eat those. |wortox = This prank is ingenious! |wurt = Taste good to me, florp. |walter = Those look suspicious. |wanda = Do you think I was born yesterday? |choose = willow }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Raisins}} Raisins == {{Object Infobox |image = Raisins Dropped.png |icon = Raisins.png |name = Raisins |hpRestored = 2 |hungerRestored = 1 |sanityRestored = 0 |foodType =[[Veggie]] [[File:Veggie.png|32px|link=Veggie]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_7"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Everyone'll be raisin' a fuss over these. |willow = Burn them!!! |wolfgang = Little shrivelly sadlumps. |wendy = Life is a swirling abyss of suffering and disappointment. |wx78 = THE KING OF PIGS WILL BE THE FIRST IMPRISONED WHEN I AM OVERLORD |wickerbottom = I'll take the ones you don't want, dears. |woodie = Eh. Think of the culinary potential. |wormwood = Belly stuff |winona = That's just regular food. |wortox = Hm... I don't think I'll like that. |wurt = Can eat yours if you don't want them, florp. |walter = I don't know what some people's problem is, raisins are good! |wanda = A little extra fiber never hurt anyone. |choose = wilson }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Ghost Pop}} Ghost Pop == {{Object Infobox |image = Ghost Pop Dropped.png |icon = Ghost Pop.png |name = Ghost Pop |hpRestored = 1 |hungerRestored = 0 |sanityRestored = 2 |foodType =[[Goodies]] [[File:Goodies.png|32px|link=Goodies]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_8"}}{{Quotes |wilson = Only a sucker wouldn't love this. |willow = Yesssss! Lollipops! |wolfgang = Is tasty little treat! |wendy = This is... fun... |wx78 = FLAVORED SUGAR STICKS |wickerbottom = How darling! |woodie = I'll tell you what it tastes like, Lucy. |maxwell = No one is above enjoying a good lollipop. |wigfrid = I shall uncöver its secret center! |webber = Candy candy candy! |warly = I don't need the whole thing, just a couple licks. |wormwood = Sad? |winona = How spooky. |wortox = Hyuyu, a candied soul! |wurt = Yummy yum! |walter = Maybe I'll give it to the twins. |wanda = This little ghost I like. |choose = woodie }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Jelly Worm}} Jelly Worm == {{Object Infobox |image = Jelly Worm Dropped.png |icon = Jelly Worm.png |name = Jelly Worm |hpRestored = 1 |hungerRestored = 2 |sanityRestored = 0 |foodType =[[Goodies]] [[File:Goodies.png|32px|link=Goodies]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_9"}}{{Quotes |wilson = Sticks to your teeth. |willow = Why does something so yummy have to look so gross! |wolfgang = Is look yucky, but taste okay. |wendy = As perplexing as it is delicious. |wx78 = EVERY TENTACLE IS EDIBLE IF YOU TRY |wickerbottom = I had best not hear of any tummy aches later. |woodie = Not too bad, eh? |maxwell = How the tables have turned, worm. |wigfrid = The battle was mighty, yet in the end the wörm was cönsumed! |webber = Gummy worms, yummy worms! |warly = I wouldn't want to ruin my dinner. |wormwood = Wiggly! |winona = Real gelatinous. |wortox = Hyuyu, it slithers all the way down! |wurt = Even better than normal worm! |walter = Gummy. |wanda = Chewy, and only a little wormy. |choose = wx78 }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Tentacle Lolli}} Tentacle Lolli == {{Object Infobox |image = Tentacle Lolli Dropped.png |icon = Tentacle Lolli.png |name = Tentacle Lolli |hpRestored = 2 |hungerRestored = 0 |sanityRestored = 1 |foodType =[[Goodies]] [[File:Goodies.png|32px|link=Goodies]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_10"}}{{Quotes |wilson = Only a sucker wouldn't love this. |willow = Yesssss! Lollipops! |wolfgang = Is tasty little treat! |wendy = This is... fun... |wx78 = FLAVORED SUGAR STICKS |wickerbottom = How darling! |woodie = I'll tell you what it tastes like, Lucy. |maxwell = No one is above enjoying a good lollipop. |wigfrid = I shall uncöver its secret center! |webber = Candy candy candy! |warly = The younger among us would enjoy it more than me. |wormwood = Mmm... |winona = Curious flavor. |wortox = First time for everything, they say, they say. |wurt = Mmm, taste like swamp! |walter = Is it made with real tentacles? |wanda = Something sweet that never goes bad, what's not to love? |choose = wurt }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Choco Pigs}} Choco Pigs == {{Object Infobox |image = Choco Pigs Dropped.png |icon = Choco Pigs.png |name = Choco Pigs |hpRestored = 1 |hungerRestored = 1 |sanityRestored = 1 |foodType =[[Goodies]] [[File:Goodies.png|32px|link=Goodies]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_11"}}{{Quotes |wilson = Much better tasting than the real thing. |willow = I'm gonna need about a dozen of these. |wolfgang = Little men of chocolate stand no chance against Wolfgang!" |wendy = You have to bite their heads off first... heehee... |wx78 = THE TREATS INSIDE ARE SHAPED LIKE FLESHLINGS |wickerbottom = I fear I've a terrible weakness for a spot of chocolate. |woodie = Melts in your mouth, not in your hand. |maxwell = Eating them makes me feel powerful. |wigfrid = Tis nöt meat, but tis clöse enöugh! |webber = Mmm! Sweet revenge! |warly = There are few things I love more than milk chocolate. |wormwood = Twirly Tail? |winona = Best eaten by the handful. |wortox = Harumpf, it melts all over my claws. |wurt = Grrr, will eat you all up!! |walter = I'm far too mature for trick or treating. |wanda = Oh alright, I'll take a nibble. |choose = wendy }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Candy Lice}} Candy Lice == {{Object Infobox |image = Candy Lice Dropped.png |icon = Candy Lice.png |name = Candy Lice |hpRestored = 1 |hungerRestored = 2 |sanityRestored = 0 |foodType =[[Goodies]] [[File:Goodies.png|32px|link=Goodies]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_12"}}{{Quotes |wilson = Did that candy just move? |willow = Yuck! Everyone watch me eat'em! |wortox = How delightfully disgusting! |wurt = Yum yum in the tum-tum! |walter = I think these might be real bugs! |wanda = If nobody else wants them I'll happily take them. |choose = winona }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Otherworldly Jawbreaker}} Otherworldly Jawbreaker == {{Object Infobox |image = Otherworldly Jawbreaker Dropped.png |icon = Otherworldly Jawbreaker.png |name = Otherworldly Jawbreaker |hpRestored = 1 |hungerRestored = 0 |sanityRestored = 2 |foodType =[[Goodies]] [[File:Goodies.png|32px|link=Goodies]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_13"}}{{Quotes |wilson = Oh, my poor jaw. |willow = It's sorta tangy. |wolfgang = Hard candy is strong like Wolfgang! |wendy = A candy as hard as my heart. |wx78 = IT TASTES LIKE THE FUTURE |wickerbottom = There will be some sore jaws in the morning, I imagine. |woodie = It's pretty good stuff. |maxwell = It's not terrible. |wigfrid = You shalt nöt break me, cönfectiön! |webber = We like these a lot. |warly = It's a little too sweet for my taste. |wormwood = Ball of belly stuff! |winona = I ain't patient enough to eat these. |wortox = I'll try a nibble, I will, I will. |wurt = Mermfolk have jaws of steel! |walter = Huh. It's sour. |wanda = That seems like a self-fulfilling prophecy. |choose = wolfgang }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Lava Pepper}} Lava Pepper == {{Object Infobox |image = Lava Pepper Dropped.png |icon = Lava Pepper.png |name = Lava Pepper |hpRestored = 0 |hungerRestored = 1 |sanityRestored = 2 |foodType =[[Veggie]] [[File:Veggie.png|32px|link=Veggie]] |spawnCode = "halloweencandy_14"}}{{Quotes |wilson = I don't do well with spice. |willow = Mmm! It burns my mouth so good! |wolfgang = Is too hot for Wolfgang!! |wendy = What is this eternal burning?! |wx78 = MY MOUTH FEELS NO PAIN |wickerbottom = A delightful ten on the Scoville scale. |woodie = Lucy doesn't like it when I eat spice. |maxwell = Only ruffians enjoy torturing themselves like this. |wigfrid = Wretched Hel's fire! |webber = Gosh, it's spicy. |warly = It sticks in my teeth, but it's well worth it. |wormwood = Ho! Ha! Hot belly stuff! |winona = Whew! That's the kick y'need! |wortox = Ooo hoo hoo, spicy! |wurt = Hot-hot, HOT!! |walter = Oh! I wasn't expecting it to actually be spicy! |wanda = Sweet mixed with spicy! |choose = wormwood }} {{clear}} == Trivia == * The Candy Lice bears a resemblance to the [[wgg:oxygennotincluded:Meal_Lice|Meal Lice plant]] from ''Oxygen Not Included'', another game developed by Klei. * Woodie's quote for Choco Pigs is a reference to the "melts in your mouth, not your hand" slogan, used for both [[wikipedia:M&M's|M&Ms]] and [[wikipedia:Galaxy_Minstrels|Minstrels]] chocolates. * "Raisins" are likely to be a reference to the practical joke of disguising animal droppings as something edible, like raisins, and convincing unsuspecting people to eat them. == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Tentacle Lolli 128x128.png|Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord Catcoon Candy 128x128.png|Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord Candy Corn 128x128.png|Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
